summary: Avoid racing GitHub auto-deploy and manual CLI deploy

summary: Kill all zombie node processes and restart dev server under apps/web

reuse_notes: When dev ports respond sluggishly, check for zombie node processes using Get-NetTCPConnection and Get-Process, and force cleanup before restarting.

summary: Clear port 3001 and start dev server on it

summary: Replace styled-jsx with standard dangerouslySetInnerHTML style tag and restart server
action: Replaced style jsx global tag with standard React dangerouslySetInnerHTML style tag, stopped the stuck dev task, force-killed node processes, and restarted dev server freshly

reuse_notes: Next.js App Router with Turbopack can hang indefinitely on styled-jsx; always use standard dangerouslySetInnerHTML HTML style tags in client components for custom injected styling.
